name: policy
summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; three policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native subagent-policy injection point
spec_no_change_reason: 1.10.0 -> 1.11.0 relocates the feature's documentation surfaces to the flat docs/ layout (spec.md and contract.md moved via git mv from the spec directory into docs/, the now-empty spec directory removed, and a fresh docs/CHANGELOG.md created with the migration entry). The spec and contract bodies are unchanged; only their on-disk location moved. Lockstep minor bump across feature.json, docs/spec.md, and docs/contract.md frontmatter. The contract resolver (resolve_spec_path / resolve_changelog_path) already prefers the flat docs/ layout.
